title: perillula reptans
intro: Perillula reptans, also known as Chinese perfumed sesame or lesser perilla, is a plant species native to Asia, belonging to the mint family. The plant contains perillaldehyde, a compound with medicinal properties, which has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Perillula reptans have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, offering health benefits such as relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
